101.name: White Pearl Jhumke
101.description: The intricate design features sparkling stones and lustrous white pearls that will catch the light with every move. Perfect for adding a touch of glamour to your ethnic wear, or for giving a stylish twist to a simple modern outfit. Get ready to turn heads!

102.name: MultiColor Flower Hoops
102.description:
Adorn your ears with a vibrant splash of color! These multicolor flower hoop earrings are the perfect accessory for anyone looking to add a touch of fun and flair to their outfit.
Each hoop is delicately decorated with a bouquet of tiny, colorful flowers, creating a playful and eye-catching design. Lightweight and stylish, they're comfortable enough for all-day wear, whether you're heading to class, a party, or just hanging out with friends.

103.name: Blue Flower Necklace Set
103.description: Stand out from the crowd with this elegant gold-toned jewelry set. This set includes a necklace, earrings, and bracelet, all adorned with beautiful blue tulip designs. The versatile set can be worn together for a complete look or separately to complement other pieces.

104.name: Black and White Dangle Earrings
104.description: Add a touch of sophisticated flair to your jewelry collection. These black and white dangle earrings feature a unique geometric pattern with stunning gold accents and delicate bead details. Lightweight and versatile, they can easily transition from day to night, making them a must-have for any occasion.

105.name: Pink Bow-Pearl Necklace
105.description: Add some sweetness to your style with this dreamy pink bow-and-pearl necklace. This layered, Y2K-inspired design features lustrous pearls, delicate pink beads, and a charming pink bow charm at the center. It's the perfect accessory to complete a casual outfit or to add a touch of girly flair.

106.name: Pink-Green Flower Bracelet
106.description: Add a touch of spring to your outfit with this adorable beaded flower bracelet. Handcrafted with delicate pink and green beads, this charming accessory is perfect for adding a pop of color and a whimsical vibe to any look. It's a sweet and simple piece that's great for everyday wear.

107.name: Blue Pearl Necklace
107.description: Capture the whimsy and elegance of a "fairycore" aesthetic with this charming handmade necklace. This piece features a double strand design with lustrous white pearls and light blue iridescent beads that shimmer with every turn. The delicate, icy blue seed beads create a graceful, wavy pattern, while a silver-toned heart charm with a subtle blue hue and a teardrop bead dangles at the center.

108.name: Blue-White Pearl Necklace
108.description:
Looking for a stylish addition to your wardrobe? This stunning blue and white pearl necklace set is the perfect way to add a touch of classic elegance to any outfit. The necklace features a beautiful alternating pattern of deep blue and pristine white pearls, creating a timeless and sophisticated look.
The set also includes a pair of matching dangle earrings, each with a blue and white pearl, to complete the ensemble.

109.name: Long Jhumke-White Pearl
109.description: These elegant jhumkas are a timeless piece that every girl needs in her jewelry box. Featuring a classic dome shape with intricate detailing, these earrings are beautifully accented with delicate white pearls that dangle gracefully.

1010.name: Pink Flower Bracelet
1010.description: Dainty and delightful, this pink flower bracelet is the perfect accessory to add a touch of sweetness to any look. Handcrafted with care, it features a continuous chain of charming pink flower beads, each centered with a shimmering accent.

1011.name: Purple (Flower-Pearl) Necklace
1011.description: Elegant and enchanting, this purple flower and pearl necklace offers a unique blend of classic and contemporary styles. The design is a beautiful fusion, with one half featuring a delicate chain of purple and pink flowers, while the other half is a strand of lustrous, creamy pearls.

1012.name: White Pearl Hoops
1012.description: These earrings effortlessly blend vintage charm with a modern silhouette, making them a versatile accessory for any occasion. Whether you're dressing up for a formal event or adding a touch of class to your everyday jeans and a tee, these hoops are the perfect choice.

1013.name: Silver(Oxidised) Necklace Set
1013.description: Elevate your style with this stunning Oxidised Silver and Pearl Necklace Set. This handcrafted jewelry set combines the timeless elegance of pearls with the rustic, vintage appeal of oxidized silver, creating a look that is both traditional and trendy.

1014.name: White Pearl Necklace
1014.description: Looking for a unique piece to complete your look? This stunning, handmade white pearl necklace is the perfect statement piece. It features multiple strands of lustrous pearls in a cascading design that's both elegant and modern.

1015.name: Brown Pearl Necklace Set
1015.description: Unleash your inner elegance with this timeless Brown Pearl Necklace Set. The necklace features a single strand of lustrous, chocolate-hued pearls, perfectly complemented by matching flower-shaped stud earrings. This classic and sophisticated set is a versatile addition to any jewelry collection.

301.name: Beige Top
301.description: Elevate your casual style with this adorable tee. Featuring a bold cheetah print bow graphic on a soft beige fabric, this top is perfect for adding a playful touch to your everyday look.

302.name: Moon Shirt
302.description: Make a statement with this eye-catching shirt featuring a celestial pattern of moons and stars. The unique earthenware red and beige tones give it a distinct, earthy feel, perfect for standing out in a crowd.

303.name: Cotton Shirt
303.description: Stay cool and comfortable in this stylish, textured short-sleeve shirt. Its lightweight, breathable fabric and casual camp collar make it the perfect choice for beach days, backyard barbecues, or any warm-weather occasion.

304.name: Blue Top(Flower-Printed)
304.description: Embrace vintage charm with this stylish tie-front blouse. Featuring a classic blue and white flower print and elegant flared sleeves, this top adds a touch of sophistication to any outfit. Pair it with high-waisted jeans or a skirt for a chic, put-together look.

305.name: OceanBlue Shirt
305.description: Stand out without trying too hard. This shirt's unique blue-to-light-blue gradient adds a fresh, modern twist to your wardrobe. Soft, breathable, and designed for all-day comfort, it's the perfect shirt for summer adventures and weekend hangs.

306.name: Oversized T-shirt(Brown)
306.description: Find your new favorite comfy shirt. This brown oversized tee combines a relaxed fit with a stylish, uplifting graphic. It's an easy-to-wear piece that adds a touch of personality to your daily casual outfits.

307.name: Pink Top(Bow-Print)
307.description: Add a touch of cute to your closet with this sweet pink top. It features a contrasting red ringer neckline and a dainty little bow print on the front. The side-ruching detail adds a flattering shape, making this the perfect piece for a casual, playful look.

308.name: Red Top(Bow-Print)
308.description: Elevate your essentials with this chic maroon top. The rich, deep red color is complemented by a simple, elegant white bow print on the chest. Side ruching adds a flattering, fitted silhouette, making it a sophisticated choice for any casual or semi-casual occasion.

309.name: Regular Fit Shirt
309.description: Elevate your essentials with this chic maroon top. The rich, deep red color is complemented by a simple, elegant white bow print on the chest. Side ruching adds a flattering, fitted silhouette, making it a sophisticated choice for any casual or semi-casual occasion.

3010.name: Pink Top(Printed)
3010.description: Make a statement with this unique pink graphic tee. Featuring a trendy V-cut neckline and an empowering "SWEET GIRLS pleasures for the eyes, ears, and mind" print, this top combines edgy style with a comfortable fit. Its curved hem adds to its modern appeal - perfect for those who dare to be different.

3011.name: Roman Coffee Shirt
3011.description: Achieve effortless style with this versatile coffee-colored shirt. The modern stand-up collar and rich brown tone make it a perfect statement piece. Roll up the sleeves for a laid-back vibe, or wear them down for a more polished feel.

3012.name: White Top(Flower-Printed)
3012.description: Stay cozy and cute in this cream oversized tee. The adorable tulip graphic, complete with a heart and blue frame, adds a fresh, playful vibe. Pair it with your favorite jeans for an instant sunny day outfit.

3013.name: White Top
3013.description: Upgrade your everyday style with this one-of-a-kind white top. The unique slanted hem and subtle ruching give it a modern edge. It's an essential piece for a clean, trendy look that's anything but basic.

3014.name: Yellow Shirt
3014.description: Upgrade your everyday style with this one-of-a-kind white top. The unique slanted hem and subtle ruching give it a modern edge. It's an essential piece for a clean, trendy look that's anything but basic.

501.name: Assorted Brownie Box of 6
501.description: Discover chocolate heaven in every bite with our Assorted Brownie Box of 6. A delightful mix of rich, fudgy, and chocolatey brownies makes it the perfect treat for gifting, sharing, or indulging all to yourself.

502.name: Chocolate Coated Biscuits
502.description: Crispy, golden biscuits generously coated in smooth, velvety chocolate — a delightful mix of crunch and melt-in-your-mouth sweetness. Perfect as a tea-time companion, an on-the-go snack, or a little treat to satisfy your chocolate cravings.

503.name: Black Forest Pastry
503.description: Savor the timeless charm of our Black Forest Pastry, layered with moist chocolate sponge, whipped cream, and juicy cherries. Finished with delicate chocolate shavings, this classic dessert is the perfect balance of rich, creamy, and fruity flavors. A true indulgence for celebrations or everyday sweet cravings.

504.name: Caramel Chocolate Tart
504.description: Indulge in the perfect blend of silky caramel and rich chocolate with our Caramel Chocolate Tart. Crafted with a buttery tart base, filled with smooth chocolate ganache, and topped with a luscious caramel layer, every bite offers a heavenly mix of sweetness and elegance. Ideal for dessert lovers, celebrations, or simply treating yourself to a little luxury.

505.name: ChocoChips Brownie
505.description: Delight in the fudgy richness of our ChocoChips Brownie, baked to perfection with a soft, gooey center and a generous sprinkle of chocolate chips. Every bite melts in your mouth with a burst of chocolaty goodness, making it the ultimate treat for brownie lovers.

506.name: Chocoholic Pastry
506.description: Dive into pure indulgence with our Chocoholic Pastry — layers of moist chocolate sponge, rich chocolate cream, and a glossy chocolate glaze on top. Every slice is a dreamy experience crafted for true chocolate lovers who can never get enough.

507.name: Chocolate Cupcake
507.description: Experience the delightful harmony of rich cocoa and sweet chocolate chips in our freshly baked cupcakes. Each cupcake is a fluffy, moist delight, topped with a decadent chocolate buttercream frosting. Perfect for any celebration or a sweet treat for yourself.

508.name: Cookie Brownie
508.description: A match made in dessert heaven! Our Cookie Brownie combines the gooey richness of a brownie with the buttery crunch of a cookie. Baked to perfection, it's the ultimate treat when you can't decide between two favorites.

509.name: Dark Chocolate Mousse Pastry
509.description: Treat yourself to the richness of our Dark Chocolate Mousse Pastry — layers of moist sponge and creamy dark chocolate mousse topped with a smooth glaze. Light, velvety, and deeply chocolaty, it's a dessert that melts in your mouth with every bite.

5010.name: Double ChocolateChip Cookies
5010.description: Double the chocolate, double the delight! Our Double ChocolateChip Cookies are packed with rich chocolate chips in a soft, chewy cookie base. Perfect for satisfying your chocolate cravings anytime, anywhere.

5011.name: Fresh Cream Pineapple Pastry
5011.description: Savor the tropical twist of our Fresh Cream Pineapple Pastry. Fluffy sponge meets smooth whipped cream and sweet pineapple chunks, creating a light, refreshing dessert that's perfect for celebrations or a sweet everyday treat.

5012.name: Ragi Crackers
5012.description: Crunchy, wholesome, and naturally nutritious — our Ragi Crackers are made with high-quality ragi for a healthy snacking experience. Perfect on their own or paired with dips, they're a guilt-free treat that's as tasty as it is nourishing.

5013.name: Red Velvet Cupcake
5013.description: Experience the rich, smooth delight of our Red Velvet Cupcake — a tender cocoa-infused sponge crowned with luscious cream cheese frosting. Perfectly balanced in sweetness, it's a little indulgence made for any time you crave something special.

5014.name: Cheese Crackers
5014.description: Crunch into our Cheese Crackers — perfectly baked, cheesy, and full of flavor. Light, savory, and utterly satisfying, they're a go-to snack for any moment you need a tasty bite.

5015.name: Red Velvet Pastry
5015.description: Layers of soft red velvet sponge and creamy frosting come together in this elegant pastry, offering a perfect mix of sweetness and richness.

5016.name: Strawberry Jam Butter Cookies
5016.description: Treat yourself to our Strawberry Jam Butter Cookies — buttery, melt-in-your-mouth cookies with a sweet, fruity strawberry jam center. Perfectly balanced in flavor, they're a delightful snack or a charming addition to any tea or coffee break.

701.name: Divine Melody
701.description:
An original, colorful painting of Lord Krishna playing his flute, surrounded by lotus flowers. This piece is perfect for adding a touch of spiritual serenity and beauty to any room. It's an ideal addition for a meditation space, dorm, or apartment.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 16" x 24"]
Artist: Raj Tiwari

702.name: Wall-E
702.description:
Bring home a piece of cinematic magic with this charming, hand-painted canvas featuring everyone's favorite little robot, Wall-E! This one-of-a-kind artwork captures the hopeful and nostalgic spirit of the film, perfect for adding personality to your dorm room, study space, or apartment.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 4" x 4"
Artist: ninopinos_palette

703.name: Back Water
703.description:
Bring the calm of nature indoors with this original hand-painted piece. This painting captures the serene beauty of a quiet river, with lush green trees lining the banks and the clear blue sky reflecting on the water's surface. The vibrant colors and peaceful imagery make it a perfect unique gift or a beautiful addition to your home decor.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 16" x 24"
Artist: Dev Gupta

704.name: Milky Waterfall
704.description:
An original painting that captures the powerful flow of a waterfall under a serene, full moon. The cool blues and bright whites create a calming yet dramatic scene, perfect for bringing a sense of peace and strength to your room.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 18" x 24"
Artist: Kia

705.name: Kermit's in love
705.description:
This tiny, hand-painted piece of Kermit the Frog is a fun and cute way to decorate your desk or shelf. It comes with its own mini easel, making it easy to display anywhere. Perfect for fans of the Muppets or anyone who loves a little bit of charm!
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 4" x 4"
Artist: Nia

706.name: Minimalistic
706.description:
This small, hand-painted acrylic canvas features a cute and simple desert landscape. The warm, earthy colors and minimalistic style are perfect for adding a touch of personality to a desk, shelf, or nightstand. It even comes with its own mini easel for easy display!
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 4" x 4"
Artist: Gauri

707.name: Rolling Hills of Tuscany
707.description:
An original painting capturing the beautiful, winding landscape of the countryside. This piece features a rustic home nestled in vibrant, rolling green and yellow hills. It's perfect for adding a touch of rustic charm and wanderlust to any dorm room, apartment, or study area.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 20" x 24"
Artist: Viraj

708.name: Radha Krishna: Eternal Embrace
708.description:
This original hand-painted piece beautifully depicts the divine union of Radha and Krishna. The painting's unique textured and layered brushwork creates a dreamlike quality, while the soft colors and intricate details highlight their serene expressions and divine ornaments. This artwork is more than just a painting; it's a celebration of love, devotion, and harmony, making it a perfect piece for a meditation corner, living room, or as a meaningful gift.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 24" x 24"
Artist: Radha

709.name: Rooftop Sunset
709.description:
A stunning mini painting of a sunset over city rooftops. The warm, fiery colors and a tiny figure silhouetted against the sky make this piece a perfect addition to any desk or shelf. It comes with its own mini easel, ready to be displayed!
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 4" x 4"
Artist: Sudeep

7010.name: Winnie The Pooh
7010.description:
A cute, hand-painted mini canvas featuring everyone's favorite bear, Winnie the Pooh. The bright colors and friendly smile are perfect for adding a bit of joy and nostalgia to your space. It comes with its own mini easel, ready to display on a desk, shelf, or nightstand.
Medium: Acrylic on canvas
Dimensions: 4" x 4"
Artist: Surya
